title: rubus × expansiformis
intro: Rubus × expansiformis, a hybrid raspberry, is a rare and lesser-known species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Rubus × expansiformis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as supporting cardiovascular and digestive health. Herbal preparations of Rubus × expansiformis can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
